verses.text: I have great conflict for you, that ye know the mystery of God, 'in whom are hid all the treasures of wisdom.' All in Christ. True wisdom is found in Him alone.
I have great conflict for you, that ye know the mystery of God, 'in whom are hid all the treasures of wisdom.' All in Christ. True wisdom is found in Him alone.
I have great conflict for you, that ye know the mystery of God, 'in whom are hid all the treasures of wisdom.' All in Christ. True wisdom is found in Him alone.
Lest any beguile you with enticing words; I joy beholding your order and stedfastness. Beware deceit. He rejoices in their firm faith.
Lest any beguile you with enticing words; I joy beholding your order and stedfastness. Beware deceit. He rejoices in their firm faith.
As ye received Christ, 'so walk ye in him,' rooted and built up, established in the faith. Walk on. Continue as you began, in Christ.
As ye received Christ, 'so walk ye in him,' rooted and built up, established in the faith. Walk on. Continue as you began, in Christ.
Beware lest any spoil you through philosophy; 'in him dwelleth all the fulness of the Godhead bodily.' Full Godhead. Christ is wholly God; seek nothing beyond Him.
Beware lest any spoil you through philosophy; 'in him dwelleth all the fulness of the Godhead bodily.' Full Godhead. Christ is wholly God; seek nothing beyond Him.
Beware lest any spoil you through philosophy; 'in him dwelleth all the fulness of the Godhead bodily.' Full Godhead. Christ is wholly God; seek nothing beyond Him.
Ye are 'buried with him in baptism,' and risen through faith. United in death and life. Baptism pictures our death and rising with Christ.
Ye are 'buried with him in baptism,' and risen through faith. United in death and life. Baptism pictures our death and rising with Christ.
He quickened you, forgiving all trespasses, 'blotting out the handwriting... nailing it to his cross.' Debt cancelled. The charge against us is nailed to Christ's cross.
He quickened you, forgiving all trespasses, 'blotting out the handwriting... nailing it to his cross.' Debt cancelled. The charge against us is nailed to Christ's cross.
He quickened you, forgiving all trespasses, 'blotting out the handwriting... nailing it to his cross.' Debt cancelled. The charge against us is nailed to Christ's cross.
Let no man judge you in meat or holyday, which are 'a shadow'; the body is of Christ. Shadows past. The forms pointed to Christ, who is come.
Let no man judge you in meat or holyday, which are 'a shadow'; the body is of Christ. Shadows past. The forms pointed to Christ, who is come.
Let no man beguile you, not holding the Head, from which the body grows. Hold the Head. Cling to Christ, the source of all increase.
Let no man beguile you, not holding the Head, from which the body grows. Hold the Head. Cling to Christ, the source of all increase.
If dead with Christ, why be subject to ordinances, which have 'a shew of wisdom' but no profit? No man-made rules. Outward rigour cannot subdue sin.
